aboutTeaser.title: Who we are
aboutTeaser.body: Pernoscal is an Egyptian startup specialized in designing and manufacturing hydraulic systems and integrated engineering solutions for heavy industry. We localize high-quality alternatives to imports and build long-term trust with every project.

aboutPage.title: About Pernoscal
aboutPage.intro: Pernoscal is an Egyptian emerging company specialized in designing and manufacturing hydraulic systems and delivering integrated engineering solutions for heavy industry and advanced industrial applications.
aboutPage.body1: The company develops products that operate in demanding conditions while maintaining peak efficiency and quality. It works to localize industry in Egypt by offering local alternatives to imported products — reducing operational costs for factories and strengthening reliance on local manufacturing.
aboutPage.body2: Pernoscal relies on accumulated practical and engineering experience in manufacturing and operations. The company applies the highest quality standards from raw material selection through final testing, with continuous innovation to improve performance and efficiency.
aboutPage.body3: We aim to build long-term customer relationships through tailored, effective solutions — a trusted partner for industrial project execution.

principles.title: Our principles
principles.subtitle: What guides every design, build, and service we deliver.
principles.p1Body: Professional work across design, manufacturing, and maintenance — not just components, but complete solutions grounded in industrial applications.
principles.p2Body: From system analysis and engineering design to the right solution for each application — fewer failures, longer equipment life, and optimal performance.
principles.p3Body: An engineering team with hands-on industrial experience — practical, innovative solutions that improve quality and competitiveness.
principles.p4Body: Rigorous standards, careful materials selection, precise manufacturing, and multi-stage testing before delivery.
principles.p5Body: Reducing import dependence with high-quality local products — supporting the national economy and industrial competitiveness.

vision.title: Our vision
vision.banner: Global-grade quality · Regional growth · Technology & partnerships
vision.body: We expand beyond Egypt into the Middle East and Africa with competitive, high-quality products and strong partner networks. We invest in manufacturing technology such as CNC to improve accuracy, reduce errors, and increase throughput — while building lasting relationships with customers and investors based on trust and quality.

productsTeaser.title: Product range
productsTeaser.subtitle: Presses and cylinders built for real factory conditions.

productsPage.title: Products
productsPage.intro: A complete range of hydraulic products designed for heavy industry — high efficiency and reliable performance under high pressure.

fourColumn.title: Four-column presses
fourColumn.short: Precision forming with exceptional speed, accuracy, and force.
fourColumn.body: Four-column presses are used in precision forming stages that demand speed, accuracy, and exceptional force. Typical applications include melamine cookware, rubber products, and metal forming.

recycling.title: Recycling presses
recycling.short: Compact bales for easier transport and storage.
recycling.body: Used in recycling programs for organic, inorganic, plastic, and metal waste. Waste is compressed into compact bales to simplify transport and reduce storage footprint.

cylinders.title: Hydraulic cylinders
cylinders.short: The core of every hydraulic system — durable and serviceable.
cylinders.body: Hydraulic cylinders are essential in any hydraulic system. They offer durability, pressure and speed capability, straightforward assembly and disassembly, and easy maintenance.

projectsTeaser.title: Selected work
projectsTeaser.subtitle: Real problems solved with engineered hydraulic solutions.

projectsPage.title: Projects
projectsPage.intro: Hydraulic products, engineering solutions, and services tailored to industrial partners — every challenge treated with the same care as our own.

psgRec35.title: Cotton bale press — Sudan
psgRec35.problem: Need for a vertical hydraulic press producing dense cotton bales of 70–90 kg with: high production rate, compact footprint, and easy loading and mobility across multiple sites in the same day.
psgRec35.solution: Engineered a mobile, high-cycle vertical baling solution sized for the client's logistics and output targets.

psgSro.title: Scrap gripper — Sharqiya
psgSro.problem: Maintenance of a five-jaw scrap gripper imported from Turkey and manufacture of a new unit to the same specifications while avoiding known design flaws. Requirements: fast motion, high pressure capacity, and internationally conventional assembly methods.
psgSro.solution: Reverse-engineered and improved the gripper for reliability under local operating conditions.

psgHp4c.title: 150 t melamine press
psgHp4c.problem: Specialized hydraulic press for melamine homeware: fast motion, high pressure and heat resistance, up to 150 tons in minimal footprint, full control of operating programs, and worker safety against operational hazards.
psgHp4c.solution: Four-column press under development with integrated control and safety concept.

psgRec3.title: Metal recycling press
psgRec3.problem: Hydraulic press for metal scrap recycling: fast motion, high pressure and heat, maximum metal storage in minimal space, full program control, and worker safety.
psgRec3.solution: Recycling press configuration in active engineering and build.

servicesPage.title: Services
servicesPage.intro: Beyond manufacturing — we support your hydraulic assets end to end.
servicesPage.maintenanceBody: Comprehensive maintenance including fault finding and repair to improve operational efficiency.
servicesPage.designBody: Custom hydraulic system design tailored to your application for best performance.
servicesPage.consultBody: Consulting to improve performance and reduce operating costs.
servicesPage.supportBody: Ongoing technical support to keep your equipment running smoothly.

jsonLd.orgDescription: Egyptian industrial hydraulic systems: presses, cylinders, design, manufacturing, and maintenance.

pillarPress.title: Pillar Press (PSG-HP4C)
pillarPress.description: The four-column structure provides superior rigidity and precise guidance for the moving platen, ensuring high accuracy and consistent quality across all forming operations.

deepDrawing.title: Deep Drawing Press (PSG-HPDD)
deepDrawing.description: Specialized hydraulic press for deep drawing and metal forming. Features precise pressure control, ideal for complex geometric shapes and large surface workpieces.

thermalPress.title: Thermal Forming Press (PSG-HPTF)
thermalPress.description: Specialized for thermal forming of rubber, silicone, porcelain, and melamine. Available with fixed or moving lower platens for improved operator safety.
thermalPress.f1: Ideal for Rubber, Silicone, and Melamine

verticalRecycling.title: Vertical Baling Press (PSG-RECV)
verticalRecycling.description: Designed for reliability and environmental efficiency. Single-axis operation ensures consistent compression of metals, plastics, and other recyclables in a compact footprint.
verticalRecycling.f1: Compact design for minimal space usage
verticalRecycling.f3: Clear points for manual bale tying

horizontalRecycling.title: Horizontal Baling Press (PSG-RECH)
horizontalRecycling.description: Fully automatic horizontal press designed for high-volume cardboard, plastic, and metal recycling. Minimizes labor costs while maximizing productivity.

metalRecycling.title: Metal Baling Press (PSG-RECM)
metalRecycling.description: Semi-automatic horizontal press specifically engineered for scrap metal, aluminum, and steel. Transforms bulky industrial debris into dense, stackable bales ready for transport.
metalRecycling.f1: Ideal for scrap metal and industrial debris
metalRecycling.f3: Reduces waste volume by up to 90%

cylinders.title: Hydraulic Cylinders (PSG-CYL)
cylinders.description: High-performance cylinders designed for durability and high-pressure linear motion. Engineered for easy maintenance and extreme reliability.

pistonRods.title: Piston Rods (PSG-ROD)
pistonRods.description: Premium hard chrome-plated piston rods (Ck45). Features exceptional surface hardness and corrosion resistance for demanding industrial applications.
pistonRods.f2: Hard chrome plating for wear resistance

honedTubes.title: Honed Tubes (PSG-TUBE)
honedTubes.description: St52.3 cold-drawn seamless honed tubes. Manufactured to strict tolerances for internal diameter smoothness and dimensional accuracy.

sealingSystems.title: Sealing Systems (PSG-SEAL)
sealingSystems.description: Comprehensive range of hydraulic seals including piston, rod, and wiper seals. Designed to withstand high pressures and extreme temperature variations.

selectionGuide.label: Selection Guide
selectionGuide.title: How to Choose
selectionGuide.subtitle: Expert insights to help you choose the perfect hydraulic press for your metal forming needs.

calculation.title: Calculate Cylinder Diameter
calculation.desc: Selecting the right hydraulic press starts with calculating the required cylinder diameter based on your pressing force needs.

example.title: Calculation Example
example.desc:
For 100 ton press at 25 MPa system pressure:

D = √(4 × 1,000,000 / 3.14159 × 25) = 225.7 mm

Recommendation: Choose PSG-HP4C-100T with Ø250mm cylinder

pressure.title: Hydraulic System Pressure
pressure.desc: Standard system pressure ranges for different hydraulic press applications.

safety.title: Safety Factor Guidelines
safety.desc: Always apply a safety factor of 1.25 - 1.5 to your calculated force. This accounts for pressure losses, seal friction, and ensures reliable operation over the machine's lifetime.

pressure.tip: Higher system pressure allows smaller cylinder diameters for the same force output.

comparison.title: Model Comparison
comparison.subtitle: Compare different hydraulic press types to find the ideal machine for your requirements.

automation.title: Automated Production Line
automation.desc: Pernoscal offers complete automated hydraulic press solutions with robots and moving worktables. Achieve unmanned operation and consistent quality.

features.f2: Moving worktable for quick die change
features.f4: Reduce labor costs by up to 80%

automation.caption: Click to view automated production line in action

faq.label: FAQ
faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Get answers to common questions about hydraulic presses and Pernoscal equipment

calculation.question: How do I calculate the required hydraulic cylinder diameter?
calculation.answer:
Use the formula: D = √(4F / πP), where D is cylinder diameter (mm), F is required force (N), and P is system pressure (MPa). For a 100-ton press at 25 MPa, the cylinder diameter would be approximately 226mm.

Always apply a 1.25-1.5 safety factor. Contact our engineering team for precise calculations for your specific application.

models.question: What's the difference between PSG-HP4C, PSG-HPDD, and PSG-HPCF hydraulic presses?
models.answer: PSG-HP4C (Pillar Press) features a four-column structure for general stamping and forming. PSG-HPDD (Deep Drawing Press) is optimized for metal deep drawing with precise cushion control. PSG-HPCF (C-Frame Press) has a compact C-frame design ideal for straightening, pressing, and small parts assembly with three-side access.

accuracy.question: How accurate is a Pernoscal hydraulic press?
accuracy.answer: Pernoscal hydraulic presses achieve stroke positioning accuracy of ±0.1mm with standard proportional valves. With servo hydraulic systems, accuracy can reach ±0.02mm. Parallelism between ram and worktable is maintained within 0.05mm/m.

materials.question: What materials can be formed with hydraulic presses?
materials.answer: Mild steel, stainless steel, aluminum, copper, brass, titanium, and various alloys. Hydraulic presses excel at deep drawing, stamping, forging, and forming operations. Material thickness capacity depends on press tonnage and working area dimensions.

delivery.question: What is the typical delivery time?
delivery.answer: Standard hydraulic presses (PSG-HPCF series) are typically ready within 3-4 weeks. Larger four-column presses (PSG-HP4C, PSG-HPDD) require 6-8 weeks for production. Custom configurations may take 8-12 weeks depending on specifications.

warranty.question: What warranty does Pernoscal provide?
warranty.answer: All Pernoscal hydraulic presses come with a comprehensive 3-year warranty covering the hydraulic system, electrical components, frame structure, and control system. Seals and hydraulic oil are consumables with recommended service intervals.

installation.question: Does Pernoscal provide on-site installation and training?
installation.answer: Yes, we offer professional on-site installation and comprehensive operator training. Our technicians will ensure your team is fully capable of operating the press, adjusting parameters, changing dies, and performing routine hydraulic system maintenance.

customization.question: Can I customize the tonnage and working area?
customization.answer: Absolutely. We offer hydraulic presses from 10 tons to 2000+ tons with customizable working area dimensions. Stroke length, daylight opening, and table size can all be tailored to your specific requirements.

safety.question: What safety features are included?
safety.answer: All Pernoscal hydraulic presses include safety guards, two-hand operation controls, emergency stop buttons, pressure relief valves, and overload protection. Optional light curtains and safety PLCs are available for enhanced operator protection.

oil.question: How often does hydraulic oil need to be changed?
oil.answer: With proper filtration and operating temperatures, hydraulic oil typically lasts 3,000-5,000 operating hours. We recommend oil analysis every 500 hours and filter changes every 1,000 hours. Quality ISO VG 46 hydraulic oil is recommended.

support.question: Is remote technical support available?
support.answer: Yes, we provide 24/7 remote technical assistance via video calls and our dedicated support portal. Many hydraulic system issues can be diagnosed and resolved remotely, minimizing downtime.

automation.question: Can Pernoscal hydraulic presses be integrated with automation?
automation.answer: Yes, our hydraulic presses can be integrated with robots, moving worktables, automatic die change systems, and conveyor lines for fully automated production. We offer complete turnkey solutions.
